case_title: YANG, DONALD VS YOUNG, KUUI HANG et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,140.00 FILED BY YANG, DONALD AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, KUUI HANG CHAN, SUEH YAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YANG, DONALD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNG, KUUI HANG CHAN, SUEH YAN $1,480.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, KUUI HANG
CORRESPONDENCE WITH ATTACHED COPIES FILED BY DEFENDANTS;
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, KUUI HANG
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, SUEH YAN
TRIAL RESET TO APR-21-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-17-2000 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
